import React, { useState,useEffect } from "react"; import Products from "../Data/Data.js" import {Link} from 'react-router-dom'; import Menu from "../Menu/Menu" const Menus = () =>{ const filterMenu = [... new Set(Menu.map(data => data.category))] console.log(filterMenu) const [filter, setFilter] = useState(filterMenu); const [items,setItem] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { setItem(Products); }, []); useEffect(() => { setItem([]); const filtered = Menu.map(p => ({ ...p, filtered: p.category.includes(filter) })); setItem(filtered); }, [filter]); return ( <>
setFilter("all")}>all setFilter("breakfast")}>BREAKFAST setFilter("dessert")}>DESSERT setFilter("dinner")}>DINNER setFilter("freshfood")}>FRESHFOOD setFilter("lunch")}>LUNCH
{items.map((item)=>{ return( item.filtered === true ? (
ADD TO CART
{item.name}
$ {item.price}
) : '' ) })}
